subtitle: personal expense tracker · rounds, gates, and coordinator jobs

items.title: Category filter on the transactions list
items.note: SHIPPED & VERIFIED 2026-03-04. Single-select, URL-synced, composes with search. Tests + build + lint green.

items.title: Integer-cents money type + migration 0003
items.note: SHIPPED 2026-03-02. Decision 0002 landed with it. No float ever reaches the API boundary.

items.title: Empty state for a filtered list with no matches
items.note: Blank table today. Add a 'no transactions match this filter' row with a clear-filters link.

items.title: Deploy the cents formatter to staging before the API-4 migration runs
items.note: GATE: a human deploy. If the migration lands before the formatter ships, staging renders raw cents as dollars. Nothing in git records whether this happened — only this row does.

items.title: Server-side monthly aggregate for the charts
items.note: Charts compute client-side from the full transaction list; won't scale past ~5k rows. Needs a design.md §5 change first.

items.title: Bulk-edit transactions
items.note: PARKED: no user has asked for it, and it complicates the optimistic-save path in the drawer. Revisit if support tickets show manual re-categorisation in bulk.

items.title: Fold the charts scaling limit into design.md §5
items.note: Coordinator job, not a round. Blocks API-5 being drafted — lock the spec, then implement.
